zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy de Morteyn於1305年出生在英國貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯時，她的父親John de Morteyn III32歲，母親Joan Rothwell22歲。她於大約1325年與John Giffard在英國巴金哈姆爾特易福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年3月8日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 圖維爾聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy de Morteyn于1305年出生在英国貝德福爾提爾斯沃斯时，她的父亲John de Morteyn III32岁，母亲Joan Rothwell22岁。她于大约1325年与John Giffard在英国巴金哈姆爾特易福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年3月8日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾特易福德享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 圖維爾聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Morteyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortagne in La Manche, France. This surname has probably been confused with   Morton  .

variants.name: Morton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of the many places called Mor(e)ton, named with Old English mōr ‘moor’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. There has probably been some confusion with Morten , and perhaps also with Murton . This English name has also been established in Ireland since the 13th century.
American shortened and altered form of Swedish Mårtensson or Mortensson (see Martenson and Mortenson ), which could also be substituted for the Finnish cognate Marttinen.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy de Morteyn was born in 1305, in Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, England, her father, John de Morteyn III, was 32 and her mother, Joan Rothwell, was 22. She married John Giffard about 1325, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 March 1360, in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in St Mary the Virgin's Church, Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy de Morteyn est née en 1305, à Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Morteyn III, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Joan Rothwell, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Giffard environ 1325, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 mars 1360, à Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à St Mary the Virgin's Church, Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1325 in Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England John Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. Lei sposato John Giffard circa 1325, nel Twyford, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Lucy de Morteynが1305年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアティルスウオルスで生まれた時，父John de Morteyn IIIは32歳，母Joan Rothwellは22歳であった。約1325年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードでJohn Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年3月8日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアトウイフォードで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエストン トゥルヴィルスト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy de Morteyn(이)가 1305년 영국 베드퍼드실르 틸스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Morteyn III(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Rothwell(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1325년 영국 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 John Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 3월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 트w이퍼드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웨스턴 터르빌 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy de Morteyn nasceu em 1305, em Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Morteyn III, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Joan Rothwell, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Giffard aproximadamente 1325, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de março de 1360, em Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em St Mary the Virgin's Church, Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy de Morteyn родилась в 1305 г. в местности тилсворт, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Morteyn III было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Rothwell, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Giffard около 1325 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 марта 1360 г. в местности твифорд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, вестон турвилл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy de Morteyn nació en 1305, en Tilsworth, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Morteyn III, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Joan Rothwell, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John Giffard aproximadamente 1325, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1360, en Twyford, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en St Mary the Virgin's Church, Weston Turville, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
